formulas.name: Domain of a Function
formulas.formula: Domain of a function f = { x ∈ R | f(x) is defined }
formulas.variables: R is the set of real numbers, f(x) is the function

formulas.name: Range of a Function
formulas.formula: Range of a function f = { y ∈ R | y = f(x) for some x in the domain of f }
formulas.variables: R is the set of real numbers, f(x) is the function

formulas.name: One-to-One Function
formulas.formula: If f: A → B is a one-to-one function, then for every y in B, there exists at most one x in A such that f(x) = y
formulas.variables: A and B are non-empty sets, f is a function from A to B

formulas.name: Onto Function
formulas.formula: If f: A → B is an onto function, then for every y in B, there exists an x in A such that f(x) = y
formulas.variables: A and B are non-empty sets, f is a function from A to B

formulas.name: Composition of Functions
formulas.variables: f and g are functions from a common domain to a common range

formulas.name: Inverse of a Function
formulas.formula: If f: A → B is an invertible function, then f^(-1): B → A is defined by f^(-1)(y) = x if f(x) = y
formulas.variables: A and B are non-empty sets, f is a function from A to B
